output.apor_source_note: APOR must be sourced from FFIEC weekly table at ffiec.gov/ratespread for the applicable lock date and comparable transaction term.
output.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.
output.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12); HMDA 12 USC §2801; FFIEC Rate Spread methodology
output.table_source: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12) (2018 HMDA Final Rule FR 2015-26607, effective Jan 2018); FFIEC Rate Spread Calculator (ffiec.gov/ratespread); first-lien threshold 1.5pp; subordinate 3.5pp; HELOC first-lien 6.5pp
